# 🟢 Ideal Profile

* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Ideal Candidate Profile (ICP) = structured representation of common traits from top candidates**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Generated by analyzing multiple good candidates (resumes + metadata)**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Use LLM to extract shared patterns (skills, experience range, education, keywords)**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Do not pass full resumes → use summarized/structured data**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Output should be structured (JSON format)**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**ICP is converted into:**</mark>
  * <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**filters (experience, location, education)**</mark>
  * <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**embedding (skills + summary)**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Used as query input for vector search**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Enables consistent and scalable candidate retrieval**</mark>
* <mark style="color:$danger;background-color:purple;">**Better than manual queries → data-driven and repeatable**</mark>
